CommonGene.description: Individual gene object for common fuction in nutrient metabolism

Species_Common Name.title: Species_Common Name
Species_Common Name.description: The main species studied (common name). e.g., Rice, Mouse, E. coli.

Species_Latin_Name.title: Species_Latin_Name
Species_Latin_Name.description: The Latin name of the species, e.g., Oryza sativa, Mus musculus, Escherichia coli.

Variety_or_Cultivar.title: Variety_or_Cultivar
Variety_or_Cultivar.description: The specific variety or cultivar used in the study (e.g., Nipponbare, Zhonghua 11).

Gene_Name.title: Gene_Name
Gene_Name.description: The name or symbol of the Core Gene, e.g., TaGS5, Pi2, BIK1.

Gene_Accession_Number.title: Gene_Accession_Number
Gene_Accession_Number.description: Accession Number (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl, Phytozome ID, LOC_*, AT*, NCBI Locus Tag). Some IDs may be in figures or tables.

Protein_Family_or_Domain.title: Protein_Family_or_Domain
Protein_Family_or_Domain.description: Protein family, enzyme class, TF family, domain architecture, or conserved motif relevant to the gene’s function.

Reference_Genome_Version.title: Reference_Genome_Version
Reference_Genome_Version.description: The reference genome version on which the coordinates are based, e.g., TAIR10, IRGSP-1.0, IWGSC1.0, GRCm39, GRCh38, ASM584v2.

Chromosome_Position.title: Chromosome_Position
Chromosome_Position.description: Gene location on chromosome, e.g., Chr1 12345–13579. Exclude SNP or variant positions

Target_Metabolite_Product.title: Target_Metabolite_Product
Target_Metabolite_Product.description: The primary nutrient, metabolite, or end product, e.g., β-carotene, anthocyanin, folate, tocopherol, lysine, oleic acid, resistant starch, iron, zinc, glucosinolate.

Target_Metabolite_Class.title: Target_Metabolite_Class
Target_Metabolite_Class.description: Broad biochemical class of the target product, e.g., carotenoid, flavonoid, vitamin, fatty acid, amino acid, alkaloid, terpenoid, polysaccharide, mineral nutrient.

Target_Product_Level_or_Property.title: Target_Product_Level_or_Property
Target_Product_Level_or_Property.description: The specific measured trait related to the target product, e.g., total content, concentration, composition, proportion, flux, accumulation, degradation rate, storage form, bioavailability, nutritional quality index.

Tissue_or_Organ_of_Metabolite_Assessment.title: Tissue_or_Organ_of_Metabolite_Assessment
Tissue_or_Organ_of_Metabolite_Assessment.description: Tissue, organ, developmental stage, or sample type in which the target metabolite was measured, e.g., seed endosperm, grain, leaf, root, fruit pericarp, tuber, embryo, callus.

Developmental_or_Physiological_Context.title: Developmental_or_Physiological_Context
Developmental_or_Physiological_Context.description: Developmental stage or physiological condition relevant to the metabolic observation, e.g., seed filling, fruit ripening, germination, senescence, stress treatment, light induction, nutrient deficiency.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.title: Core_Phenotypic_Effect
Core_Phenotypic_Effect.description: The main conclusion about how the focal gene affects the target metabolite/product, e.g. promotes β-carotene accumulation; reduces phytic acid content; increases oleic acid proportion.

Effect_Direction_on_Target_Product.title: Effect_Direction_on_Target_Product
Effect_Direction_on_Target_Product.description: Standardized direction of effect on the target product: "increase", "decrease", "required for accumulation", "required for conversion", "promotes flux toward product", "diverts flux away from product", "unknown/complex".

Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations.title: Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations
Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations.description: Quantitative change in metabolite/product level or related phenotype, e.g., percentages, fold change, absolute values, ratios, or composition shifts.

Other_Phenotypic_Effects.title: Other_Phenotypic_Effects
Other_Phenotypic_Effects.description: Other observed phenotypes linked to the gene beyond the target metabolite, e.g., growth defects, altered seed size, color change, stress response, developmental changes, yield penalty.

Core_Validation_Method.title: Core_Validation_Method
Core_Validation_Method.description: Most critical functional validation approaches supporting the gene–metabolite mapping, e.g., knockout, overexpression, complementation, enzyme assay, transactivation assay, transient expression, metabolite profiling, isotope labeling.

Metabolite_Assay_Method.title: Metabolite_Assay_Method
Metabolite_Assay_Method.description: Method(s) used to quantify the target metabolite/product, e.g., HPLC, LC-MS/MS, GC-MS, ICP-MS, spectrophotometry, enzymatic assay, NMR, targeted metabolomics, untargeted metabolomics, isotope tracing.

Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method.title: Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method
Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method.description: How the gene was identified in the study, e.g., map-based cloning, GWAS, QTL fine mapping, homology search, coexpression analysis, omics-driven prioritization, mutant screen, candidate-gene approach.

Omics_Data.title: Omics_Data
Omics_Data.description: List the omics data types used in the study (e.g., RNA-seq, resequencing, metabolomics, single-cell) and their corresponding database accession numbers.

Genetic_Population.title: Genetic_Population
Genetic_Population.description: Population or panel used for discovery or validation, e.g., GWAS panel, F2, RIL, diversity panel, introgression population, mutant collection.

QTL_or_Locus_Name.title: QTL_or_Locus_Name
QTL_or_Locus_Name.description: Associated QTL or named locus if the gene is embedded in a locus-mapping context.

Key_Variant_Type.title: Key_Variant_Type
Key_Variant_Type.description: Functional variant type affecting the gene or phenotype, e.g., SNP, Indel, CNV, PAV, promoter insertion, splicing variant, structural rearrangement.

Key_Variant_Site.title: Key_Variant_Site
Key_Variant_Site.description: Specific variant(s) linked to altered metabolic function or target product level.

Favorable_Allele.title: Favorable_Allele
Favorable_Allele.description: Allele or haplotype associated with desirable metabolite/nutritional outcome.

Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Field_Trials.title: Field_Trials
Field_Trials.description: Field or greenhouse trial information relevant to validation of metabolite-related phenotype.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.title: Notes_or_Other_Important_Info
Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

CommonGene.title: CommonGene

CommonGeneExtraction.description: Complete model for extracting common gene function information from nutrient metabolism studies.

Title.description: The full title of the paper.
Title.title: Title

Journal.description: The name of the journal that published the paper.
Journal.title: Journal

DOI.description: The DOI number of the literature, excluding any URL prefix (e.g., "https://doi.org/"). Only extract the pure DOI string, e.g., 10.1016/j.plantsci.2024.111234.
DOI.title: Doi

Genes.description: List of gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.

Core_Validation_Method.description: Most critical functional validation approaches supporting the gene–metabolite mapping, e.g., knockout, overexpression, complementation, enzyme assay, transactivation assay, transient expression, metabolite profiling, isotope labeling.

Metabolite_Assay_Method.title: Metabolite_Assay_Method
Metabolite_Assay_Method.description: Method(s) used to quantify the target metabolite/product, e.g., HPLC, LC-MS/MS, GC-MS, ICP-MS, spectrophotometry, enzymatic assay, NMR, targeted metabolomics, untargeted metabolomics, isotope tracing.

Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method.title: Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method
Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method.description: How the gene was identified in the study, e.g., map-based cloning, GWAS, QTL fine mapping, homology search, coexpression analysis, omics-driven prioritization, mutant screen, candidate-gene approach.

Omics_Data.title: Omics_Data
Omics_Data.description: List the omics data types used in the study (e.g., RNA-seq, resequencing, metabolomics, single-cell) and their corresponding database accession numbers.

Genetic_Population.title: Genetic_Population
Genetic_Population.description: Population or panel used for discovery or validation, e.g., GWAS panel, F2, RIL, diversity panel, introgression population, mutant collection.

QTL_or_Locus_Name.title: QTL_or_Locus_Name
QTL_or_Locus_Name.description: Associated QTL or named locus if the gene is embedded in a locus-mapping context.

Key_Variant_Type.title: Key_Variant_Type
Key_Variant_Type.description: Functional variant type affecting the gene or phenotype, e.g., SNP, Indel, CNV, PAV, promoter insertion, splicing variant, structural rearrangement.

Key_Variant_Site.title: Key_Variant_Site
Key_Variant_Site.description: Specific variant(s) linked to altered metabolic function or target product level.

Favorable_Allele.title: Favorable_Allele
Favorable_Allele.description: Allele or haplotype associated with desirable metabolite/nutritional outcome.

Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Field_Trials.title: Field_Trials
Field_Trials.description: Field or greenhouse trial information relevant to validation of metabolite-related phenotype.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.title: Notes_or_Other_Important_Info
Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Enzyme_Name.title: Enzyme_Name
Enzyme_Name.description: Standard enzyme name corresponding to the focal gene product.

EC_Number.title: EC_Number
EC_Number.description: Enzyme_Commission number if reported or confidently inferable from the paper’s enzyme assignment.

Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.title: Catalyzed_Reaction_Description
Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.description: The biochemical reaction catalyzed by the enzyme, described in plain but precise form, e.g., converts phytoene to ζ-carotene through desaturation; hydroxylates β-carotene to zeaxanthin.

Primary_Substrate.title: Primary_Substrate
Primary_Substrate.description: Main substrate(s) used by the enzyme in the relevant metabolic step.

Primary_Product.title: Primary_Product
Primary_Product.description: Immediate product(s) generated by the enzyme in the relevant step.

Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function.title: Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function
Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function.description: Direct evidence supporting the enzyme assignment, e.g., recombinant protein assay, in vitro catalysis, in vivo complementation, substrate feeding, isotope tracing, mutant metabolite accumulation pattern

Biosynthetic_Pathway.title: Biosynthetic_Pathway
Biosynthetic_Pathway.description: Name of the metabolic or biosynthetic pathway to which the focal gene is assigned.

Metabolic_Step_Position.title: Metabolic_Step_Position
Metabolic_Step_Position.description: Relative position of the enzymatic step within the pathway: upstream, midstream, downstream, terminal step, branch point, committed step, side-route, salvage/recycling step.

Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.title: Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway
Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.description: Specific branch, module, or subpathway in which the enzyme functions, e.g., β-branch of carotenoid pathway; flavonol branch; tocopherol cyclization branch.

Evidence_for_Pathway_Position.title: Evidence_for_Pathway_Position
Evidence_for_Pathway_Position.description: Evidence showing where the enzyme acts in the pathway, e.g., precursor accumulation, loss of downstream products, epistasis, feeding assays, coexpression with pathway genes, or metabolic flux analysis.

End_Product_Connection_Type.title: End_Product_Connection_Type
End_Product_Connection_Type.description: How the catalytic step connects to the target product: directly forms target product, forms immediate precursor, supplies precursor pool, diverts flux toward target product, competes with target-product branch, required for storage/modification of target product.

Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.title: Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product
Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.description: Standardized classification: direct, near-direct via immediate precursor, indirect via upstream precursor supply, indirect via branch competition.

Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.title: Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step
Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.description: Whether the paper supports this enzyme as a rate-limiting enzyme, key control point, committed-step enzyme, terminal determinant, branch-switch enzyme, bottleneck enzyme, or not established.

Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement.title: Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement
Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement.description: Cofactor(s), co-substrate(s), metal ions, reducing partners, or other biochemical requirements if relevant to catalytic interpretation.

PathwayGene.title: PathwayGene

PathwayGeneExtraction.description: Complete model for extracting pathway gene function information from nutrient metabolism studies.

QTL_or_Locus_Name.description: Associated QTL or named locus if the gene is embedded in a locus-mapping context.

Key_Variant_Type.description: Functional variant type affecting the gene or phenotype, e.g., SNP, Indel, CNV, PAV, promoter insertion, splicing variant, structural rearrangement.

Key_Variant_Site.title: Key_Variant_Site
Key_Variant_Site.description: Specific variant(s) linked to altered metabolic function or target product level.

Favorable_Allele.title: Favorable_Allele
Favorable_Allele.description: Allele or haplotype associated with desirable metabolite/nutritional outcome.

Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Field_Trials.title: Field_Trials
Field_Trials.description: Field or greenhouse trial information relevant to validation of metabolite-related phenotype.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.title: Notes_or_Other_Important_Info
Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Regulator_Type.title: Regulator_Type
Regulator_Type.description: Type of regulator, e.g., transcription factor, signaling kinase, phosphatase, E3 ligase, transporter regulator, RNA-binding protein, chromatin modifier, miRNA-related factor, scaffold protein, hormone-response regulator, etc.

Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.title: Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator
Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.description: Whether the gene regulates the target metabolic process directly, indirectly, or with unresolved directness.

Regulation_Mode.title: Regulation_Mode
Regulation_Mode.description: Mode of regulation, e.g., transcriptional activation, transcriptional repression, chromatin opening, protein stabilization, ubiquitin-mediated degradation, phosphorylation activation, dephosphorylation, RNA silencing, translation control, transport control, feedback regulation.

Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.title: Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs
Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.description: Signals, hormones, nutrients, stresses, or developmental cues acting upstream of the regulator.

Primary_Regulatory_Targets.title: Primary_Regulatory_Targets
Primary_Regulatory_Targets.description: The principal downstream genes, enzymes, transporters, or pathway modules regulated by the focal gene.

Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.title: Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes
Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.description: Directional effect on key downstream metabolic genes, e.g., activates PSY1 and LCYB; represses FAD2; stabilizes PAP1; promotes degradation of enzyme E.

Regulatory_Scope.title: Regulatory_Scope
Regulatory_Scope.description: Whether the regulator affects single key gene, multiple pathway genes, entire pathway module, specific branch, precursor supply network, storage/sequestration system, or global metabolic program.

Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence.title: Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence
Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence.description: Evidence for direct regulation, e.g., ChIP, ChIP-seq, EMSA, Y1H, DAP-seq, promoter-reporter assay, CUT&Tag, RIP, CLIP, or direct protein-target biochemical evidence.

Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.title: Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product
Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.description: Standardized classification: direct via direct regulation of key metabolic gene(s), indirect via secondary regulator, indirect via signaling/hormone pathway, indirect via precursor or transport control.

Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.title: Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product
Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.description: Clear statement of why this regulator is considered decisive for the target product, e.g., master regulator, major switch, essential activator, strong repressor, condition-dependent controller, ripening-specific inducer, nutrient-responsive regulator.

Metabolic_Process_Controlled.title: Metabolic_Process_Controlled
Metabolic_Process_Controlled.description: The controlled metabolic process, e.g., biosynthesis, degradation, transport, sequestration, precursor supply, branch selection, remodeling, storage deposition, or feedback homeostasis.

Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.title: Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation
Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.description: Whether the regulator participates in feedback, feedforward, autoregulation, metabolite-dependent repression/activation, or homeostatic loops.

Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation.title: Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation
Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation.description: Whether regulation occurs in a specific tissue, developmental stage, treatment, or environmental condition.

Interaction_with_Other_Regulators.title: Interaction_with_Other_Regulators
Interaction_with_Other_Regulators.description: Cooperative, antagonistic, or hierarchical interactions with other TFs/regulators affecting the same metabolite pathway.

RegulationGene.title: RegulationGene

RegulationGeneExtraction.description: Complete model for extracting regulation gene function information from nutrient metabolism studies.

Title.description: The full title of the paper.
Title.title: Title

Journal.description: The name of the journal that published the paper.
Journal.title: Journal

DOI.description: The DOI number of the literature, excluding any URL prefix (e.g., "https://doi.org/"). Only extract the pure DOI string, e.g., 10.1016/j.plantsci.2024.111234.
DOI.title: Doi

Genes.description: List of gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.
Genes.title: Genes

RegulationGeneExtraction.title: RegulationGeneExtraction

CommonGene.description: Individual gene object for common fuction in nutrient metabolism

Species_Common Name.title: Species_Common Name
Species_Common Name.description: The main species studied (common name). e.g., Rice, Mouse, E. coli.

Species_Latin_Name.title: Species_Latin_Name
Species_Latin_Name.description: The Latin name of the species, e.g., Oryza sativa, Mus musculus, Escherichia coli.

Variety_or_Cultivar.title: Variety_or_Cultivar
Variety_or_Cultivar.description: The specific variety or cultivar used in the study (e.g., Nipponbare, Zhonghua 11).

Gene_Name.title: Gene_Name
Gene_Name.description: The name or symbol of the Core Gene, e.g., TaGS5, Pi2, BIK1.

Gene_Accession_Number.title: Gene_Accession_Number
Gene_Accession_Number.description: Accession Number (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl, Phytozome ID, LOC_*, AT*, NCBI Locus Tag). Some IDs may be in figures or tables.

Protein_Family_or_Domain.title: Protein_Family_or_Domain
Protein_Family_or_Domain.description: Protein family, enzyme class, TF family, domain architecture, or conserved motif relevant to the gene’s function.

Reference_Genome_Version.title: Reference_Genome_Version
Reference_Genome_Version.description: The reference genome version on which the coordinates are based, e.g., TAIR10, IRGSP-1.0, IWGSC1.0, GRCm39, GRCh38, ASM584v2.

Chromosome_Position.title: Chromosome_Position
Chromosome_Position.description: Gene location on chromosome, e.g., Chr1 12345–13579. Exclude SNP or variant positions

Target_Metabolite_Product.title: Target_Metabolite_Product
Target_Metabolite_Product.description: The primary nutrient, metabolite, or end product, e.g., β-carotene, anthocyanin, folate, tocopherol, lysine, oleic acid, resistant starch, iron, zinc, glucosinolate.

Target_Metabolite_Class.title: Target_Metabolite_Class
Target_Metabolite_Class.description: Broad biochemical class of the target product, e.g., carotenoid, flavonoid, vitamin, fatty acid, amino acid, alkaloid, terpenoid, polysaccharide, mineral nutrient.

Target_Product_Level_or_Property.title: Target_Product_Level_or_Property
Target_Product_Level_or_Property.description: The specific measured trait related to the target product, e.g., total content, concentration, composition, proportion, flux, accumulation, degradation rate, storage form, bioavailability, nutritional quality index.

Tissue_or_Organ_of_Metabolite_Assessment.title: Tissue_or_Organ_of_Metabolite_Assessment
Tissue_or_Organ_of_Metabolite_Assessment.description: Tissue, organ, developmental stage, or sample type in which the target metabolite was measured, e.g., seed endosperm, grain, leaf, root, fruit pericarp, tuber, embryo, callus.

Developmental_or_Physiological_Context.title: Developmental_or_Physiological_Context
Developmental_or_Physiological_Context.description: Developmental stage or physiological condition relevant to the metabolic observation, e.g., seed filling, fruit ripening, germination, senescence, stress treatment, light induction, nutrient deficiency.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.title: Core_Phenotypic_Effect
Core_Phenotypic_Effect.description: The main conclusion about how the focal gene affects the target metabolite/product, e.g. promotes β-carotene accumulation; reduces phytic acid content; increases oleic acid proportion.

Effect_Direction_on_Target_Product.title: Effect_Direction_on_Target_Product
Effect_Direction_on_Target_Product.description: Standardized direction of effect on the target product: "increase", "decrease", "required for accumulation", "required for conversion", "promotes flux toward product", "diverts flux away from product", "unknown/complex".

Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations.title: Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations
Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations.description: Quantitative change in metabolite/product level or related phenotype, e.g., percentages, fold change, absolute values, ratios, or composition shifts.

Other_Phenotypic_Effects.title: Other_Phenotypic_Effects
Other_Phenotypic_Effects.description: Other observed phenotypes linked to the gene beyond the target metabolite, e.g., growth defects, altered seed size, color change, stress response, developmental changes, yield penalty.

Core_Validation_Method.title: Core_Validation_Method
Core_Validation_Method.description: Most critical functional validation approaches supporting the gene–metabolite mapping, e.g., knockout, overexpression, complementation, enzyme assay, transactivation assay, transient expression, metabolite profiling, isotope labeling.

Metabolite_Assay_Method.title: Metabolite_Assay_Method
Metabolite_Assay_Method.description: Method(s) used to quantify the target metabolite/product, e.g., HPLC, LC-MS/MS, GC-MS, ICP-MS, spectrophotometry, enzymatic assay, NMR, targeted metabolomics, untargeted metabolomics, isotope tracing.

Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method.title: Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method
Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method.description: How the gene was identified in the study, e.g., map-based cloning, GWAS, QTL fine mapping, homology search, coexpression analysis, omics-driven prioritization, mutant screen, candidate-gene approach.

Omics_Data.title: Omics_Data
Omics_Data.description: List the omics data types used in the study (e.g., RNA-seq, resequencing, metabolomics, single-cell) and their corresponding database accession numbers.

Genetic_Population.title: Genetic_Population
Genetic_Population.description: Population or panel used for discovery or validation, e.g., GWAS panel, F2, RIL, diversity panel, introgression population, mutant collection.

QTL_or_Locus_Name.title: QTL_or_Locus_Name
QTL_or_Locus_Name.description: Associated QTL or named locus if the gene is embedded in a locus-mapping context.

Key_Variant_Type.title: Key_Variant_Type
Key_Variant_Type.description: Functional variant type affecting the gene or phenotype, e.g., SNP, Indel, CNV, PAV, promoter insertion, splicing variant, structural rearrangement.

Key_Variant_Site.title: Key_Variant_Site
Key_Variant_Site.description: Specific variant(s) linked to altered metabolic function or target product level.

Favorable_Allele.title: Favorable_Allele
Favorable_Allele.description: Allele or haplotype associated with desirable metabolite/nutritional outcome.

Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Field_Trials.title: Field_Trials
Field_Trials.description: Field or greenhouse trial information relevant to validation of metabolite-related phenotype.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.title: Notes_or_Other_Important_Info
Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Omics_Data.title: Omics_Data
Omics_Data.description: List the omics data types used in the study (e.g., RNA-seq, resequencing, metabolomics, single-cell) and their corresponding database accession numbers.

Genetic_Population.title: Genetic_Population
Genetic_Population.description: Population or panel used for discovery or validation, e.g., GWAS panel, F2, RIL, diversity panel, introgression population, mutant collection.

QTL_or_Locus_Name.description: Associated QTL or named locus if the gene is embedded in a locus-mapping context.

Field_Trials.title: Field_Trials
Field_Trials.description: Field or greenhouse trial information relevant to validation of metabolite-related phenotype.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.title: Notes_or_Other_Important_Info
Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Enzyme_Name.title: Enzyme_Name
Enzyme_Name.description: Standard enzyme name corresponding to the focal gene product.

EC_Number.title: EC_Number
EC_Number.description: Enzyme_Commission number if reported or confidently inferable from the paper’s enzyme assignment.

Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.title: Catalyzed_Reaction_Description
Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.description: The biochemical reaction catalyzed by the enzyme, described in plain but precise form, e.g., converts phytoene to ζ-carotene through desaturation; hydroxylates β-carotene to zeaxanthin.

Primary_Substrate.title: Primary_Substrate
Primary_Substrate.description: Main substrate(s) used by the enzyme in the relevant metabolic step.

Primary_Product.title: Primary_Product
Primary_Product.description: Immediate product(s) generated by the enzyme in the relevant step.

Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function.title: Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function
Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function.description: Direct evidence supporting the enzyme assignment, e.g., recombinant protein assay, in vitro catalysis, in vivo complementation, substrate feeding, isotope tracing, mutant metabolite accumulation pattern

Biosynthetic_Pathway.title: Biosynthetic_Pathway
Biosynthetic_Pathway.description: Name of the metabolic or biosynthetic pathway to which the focal gene is assigned.

Metabolic_Step_Position.title: Metabolic_Step_Position
Metabolic_Step_Position.description: Relative position of the enzymatic step within the pathway: upstream, midstream, downstream, terminal step, branch point, committed step, side-route, salvage/recycling step.

Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.title: Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway
Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.description: Specific branch, module, or subpathway in which the enzyme functions, e.g., β-branch of carotenoid pathway; flavonol branch; tocopherol cyclization branch.

Evidence_for_Pathway_Position.title: Evidence_for_Pathway_Position
Evidence_for_Pathway_Position.description: Evidence showing where the enzyme acts in the pathway, e.g., precursor accumulation, loss of downstream products, epistasis, feeding assays, coexpression with pathway genes, or metabolic flux analysis.

End_Product_Connection_Type.title: End_Product_Connection_Type
End_Product_Connection_Type.description: How the catalytic step connects to the target product: directly forms target product, forms immediate precursor, supplies precursor pool, diverts flux toward target product, competes with target-product branch, required for storage/modification of target product.

Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.title: Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product
Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.description: Standardized classification: direct, near-direct via immediate precursor, indirect via upstream precursor supply, indirect via branch competition.

Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.title: Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step
Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.description: Whether the paper supports this enzyme as a rate-limiting enzyme, key control point, committed-step enzyme, terminal determinant, branch-switch enzyme, bottleneck enzyme, or not established.

Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement.title: Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement
Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement.description: Cofactor(s), co-substrate(s), metal ions, reducing partners, or other biochemical requirements if relevant to catalytic interpretation.

Genetic_Population.title: Genetic_Population

QTL_or_Locus_Name.description: Associated QTL or named locus if the gene is embedded in a locus-mapping context.

Key_Variant_Type.description: Functional variant type affecting the gene or phenotype, e.g., SNP, Indel, CNV, PAV, promoter insertion, splicing variant, structural rearrangement.

Key_Variant_Site.description: Specific variant(s) linked to altered metabolic function or target product level.

Favorable_Allele.title: Favorable_Allele

Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.title: Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor
Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.description: Environmental or treatment conditions directly affecting interpretation of the metabolic effect, e.g., light, temperature, nutrient supply, elicitor treatment, salt stress, pathogen infection, exogenous hormone, postharvest treatment.

Field_Trials.title: Field_Trials
Field_Trials.description: Field or greenhouse trial information relevant to validation of metabolite-related phenotype.

Breeding_Application_Value.title: Breeding_Application_Value
Breeding_Application_Value.description: Stated or inferred breeding relevance of the gene for nutritional improvement, biofortification, quality enhancement, or metabolic engineering.

Potential_Tradeoffs.title: Potential_Tradeoffs
Potential_Tradeoffs.description: Growth penalty, yield change, stress susceptibility, off-target metabolic shifts.

Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.title: Notes_or_Other_Important_Info
Notes_or_Other_Important_Info.description: Important metabolism-related details not captured elsewhere, such as contradictory evidence, species-specific nuances, dual function, uncertain catalytic assignment, tissue-specific pathway divergence, or special caveats.

Regulator_Type.title: Regulator_Type
Regulator_Type.description: Type of regulator, e.g., transcription factor, signaling kinase, phosphatase, E3 ligase, transporter regulator, RNA-binding protein, chromatin modifier, miRNA-related factor, scaffold protein, hormone-response regulator, etc.

Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.title: Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator
Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator.description: Whether the gene regulates the target metabolic process directly, indirectly, or with unresolved directness.

Regulation_Mode.title: Regulation_Mode
Regulation_Mode.description: Mode of regulation, e.g., transcriptional activation, transcriptional repression, chromatin opening, protein stabilization, ubiquitin-mediated degradation, phosphorylation activation, dephosphorylation, RNA silencing, translation control, transport control, feedback regulation.

Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.title: Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs
Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.description: Signals, hormones, nutrients, stresses, or developmental cues acting upstream of the regulator.

Primary_Regulatory_Targets.title: Primary_Regulatory_Targets
Primary_Regulatory_Targets.description: The principal downstream genes, enzymes, transporters, or pathway modules regulated by the focal gene.

Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.title: Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes
Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes.description: Directional effect on key downstream metabolic genes, e.g., activates PSY1 and LCYB; represses FAD2; stabilizes PAP1; promotes degradation of enzyme E.

Regulatory_Scope.title: Regulatory_Scope
Regulatory_Scope.description: Whether the regulator affects single key gene, multiple pathway genes, entire pathway module, specific branch, precursor supply network, storage/sequestration system, or global metabolic program.

Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence.title: Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence
Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence.description: Evidence for direct regulation, e.g., ChIP, ChIP-seq, EMSA, Y1H, DAP-seq, promoter-reporter assay, CUT&Tag, RIP, CLIP, or direct protein-target biochemical evidence.

Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.title: Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product
Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product.description: Standardized classification: direct via direct regulation of key metabolic gene(s), indirect via secondary regulator, indirect via signaling/hormone pathway, indirect via precursor or transport control.

Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.title: Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product
Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product.description: Clear statement of why this regulator is considered decisive for the target product, e.g., master regulator, major switch, essential activator, strong repressor, condition-dependent controller, ripening-specific inducer, nutrient-responsive regulator.

Metabolic_Process_Controlled.title: Metabolic_Process_Controlled
Metabolic_Process_Controlled.description: The controlled metabolic process, e.g., biosynthesis, degradation, transport, sequestration, precursor supply, branch selection, remodeling, storage deposition, or feedback homeostasis.

Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.title: Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation
Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation.description: Whether the regulator participates in feedback, feedforward, autoregulation, metabolite-dependent repression/activation, or homeostatic loops.

Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation.title: Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation
Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation.description: Whether regulation occurs in a specific tissue, developmental stage, treatment, or environmental condition.

Interaction_with_Other_Regulators.title: Interaction_with_Other_Regulators
Interaction_with_Other_Regulators.description: Cooperative, antagonistic, or hierarchical interactions with other TFs/regulators affecting the same metabolite pathway.

RegulationGene.title: RegulationGene

MultipleGeneExtraction.description: Complete model for extracting common, pathway, and regulation gene function information from nutrient metabolism studies.

DOI.description: The DOI number of the literature, excluding any URL prefix (e.g., "https://doi.org/"). Only extract the pure DOI string, e.g., 10.1016/j.plantsci.2024.111234.
DOI.title: Doi

Common_Genes.description: List of common gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.
Common_Genes.title: Common Genes

Pathway_Genes.description: List of pathway gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.
Pathway_Genes.title: Pathway Genes

Regulation_Genes.description: List of regulation gene objects extracted from this study. Each gene object contains all gene-specific information including species information.
Regulation_Genes.title: Regulation Genes

MultipleGeneExtraction.title: MultipleGeneExtraction
